metadata.explanation: This `api.js` file centralizes all API calls to the FastAPI backend using Axios. It defines a base URL and creates an Axios instance with default headers. It then exports a set of asynchronous functions for each CRUD operation (Create, Read, Update, Delete) for Todo items, mirroring the backend API endpoints. Each function includes basic `try-catch` blocks for error handling, logging the error and re-throwing it for the calling component to manage UI-specific error states. An optional `getHealthStatus` function is also included to check the backend's health endpoint.
